lessons.text: Don't just learn it. Live it.
Real understanding is rare. Earn it patiently.
You are more than your body and thoughts.
Everything is connected. Nothing stands alone.
Notice the wonder in ordinary things.
Behind every talent is the same quiet spark.

lessons.note: Pure guna metaphysics; kernel overlaps 154/159 (moods aren't you). Dropped to avoid redundancy.

lessons.text: Don't let a passing mood distort what's real.
When judgment clouds, good people lose their way.
Seek meaning, not just relief or reward.
Stay steady on what matters most.
Look for something worthwhile in everyone you meet.
Craving quietly steers you toward lesser things.
What you give attention to grows.
Chase what lasts, not what's quick.
Don't mistake the surface for the whole.
Stay humble. No one is ever fully known.
Don't be ruled by every like and dislike.

lessons.note: Content is metaphysics (Brahman, the Self, the mechanics of action/death); no universal daily kernel survives translation.

lessons.text: Something in you stays constant through every change.
You become whatever you dwell on.
Keep what matters in mind while you work.
Steady the mind with daily practice.
Lift your mind toward something larger than yourself.
Quiet the noise and turn inward.
Anchor a restless mind on one word.
Practiced daily, the hard thing grows easy.
Chase the lasting and step off the treadmill.
Everything built in time eventually dissolves.
Invest in what outlasts you.
Give your whole heart to one aim.
Move toward the light, not the smoke.
Stay steady in practice through every season.
Inner work outlasts every outward show.
Meet new ideas without cynicism.
The best path is often the simplest.
Without conviction, you drift back to the start.
Be part of everything, attached to nothing.
What ends makes room for a new beginning.
Do the work without getting tangled in it.
Don't overlook greatness in ordinary packaging.
Do one thing at a time, completely.
The same thread runs through everyone.
Quick rewards run out. Deeper ones don't.
Commit fully, and you'll find what you need.
Every sincere effort counts, whatever its form.
Given sincerely, even a small gift means everything.
Pour yourself fully into whatever you do.
Do the work, release the outcome.
You get back the closeness you give.
It's never too late to change direction.
The best in life is open to everyone.
Show up fully: mind, heart, and effort.
